generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former intelligence analyst, I've seen firsthand how outdated laws hamstring our ability to protect citizens. The 2024 National Security Review found that 78% of domestic threats slip through because agencies can't share information fast enough. We need modernized powers to keep up with evolving threats. #SecurityFirst #ProtectOurRights
